summary: Tested MixLink price field migration (hourly_rate → price), new admin@mixlink.com account, and removal of old /admin/login route. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified after clearing stale metro cache (CI=true disabled hot reload, causing DJCard to serve old '/h' label). After cache clear + expo restart, all frontend labels correctly show 'prestation' and 'Prix de la prestation'.

ui_bugs.issue: Stale metro cache (CI=true disables hot reload) caused DJCard to display old '€/h' label instead of new '€ prestation' label. Fixed by clearing .metro-cache and restarting expo server. This is a systemic issue - any future source changes won't be picked up automatically in CI mode.

action_items: IMPORTANT: The metro cache was cleared and expo server restarted to fix stale DJCard bundle (CI=true disables hot reload). Monitor if this issue reoccurs after future source changes. Consider removing CI=true from expo environment or adding cache-clear step to deployment workflow.
Minor: profile.tsx still has djProfile.hourly_rate as fallback (line 70 and 466). This is harmless since all DB records have been migrated to 'price', but could be cleaned up for code quality.
Minor: DJ Shiishe shows price=1€ in the database which seems incorrect. Should be reviewed.
critical_code_review_comments: CI=true in expo environment prevents hot reload and file watching. This means source code changes won't be auto-detected by metro bundler. When DJCard.tsx was updated (hourly_rate→price, /h→prestation), the old cached bundle continued to serve until manually cleared. This is a potential ongoing issue for all frontend changes.
profile.tsx still references djProfile.hourly_rate as fallback in two places (lines 70, 466). While harmless post-migration, these should be cleaned up for code clarity.
seed_data_creation: Created test users during backend tests: test_dj_price_912197@example.com (DJ), test_org_4fe6c7@example.com (organizer). These are visible in the admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All price field migration tests passed (15/15 backend). Frontend verified manually. Key fix done: cleared stale .metro-cache and restarted expo server (CI=true prevents hot reload). Admin@mixlink.com works. Old /api/admin/login returns 404. DJCard shows '{price}€ prestation' correctly. DJ profile page shows 'prestation' (no /h). Profile form shows 'Prix de la prestation (€) *'. Admin dashboard at /admin loads with stats and user management.

DJCard_stale_cache.root_cause: Expo metro is running with CI=true environment variable, which disables file watching (hot reload). When DJCard.tsx was updated to use 'price' and 'prestation' (replacing 'hourly_rate' and '/h'), metro did not detect the file change and continued serving the old cached bundle from .metro-cache.
DJCard_stale_cache.reproduction_steps: 1. Modify DJCard.tsx source, 2. Load the home page - it will show the OLD content from cache, 3. Clear .metro-cache directory + restart expo to get the new content
DJCard_stale_cache.mitigation: Option A: Remove CI=true from expo environment to enable hot reload. Option B: Add cache-clear step to deployment workflow. Option C: Accept that expo server restart is required after frontend source changes.
